name: Clara
dialogue: Chosen One, sister Archpriestess, thank you for letting me arrive safely.
Listen up, we're gonna go pray to the Chosen One.
If you don't want to, speak up. I'll hang you upside down...
title: The Bound Child

name: Kahlor
dialogue: What do I hate? Anything that chains it down!
title: First Avatar

name: Lucy
dialogue: Oh, this is a spotlight, not a searchlight!
Oh, that's what you know me as? Then call me that, darling!
title: Trickster

name: Randi
dialogue: You know the battleball but not the southpaw fireballer?
Have you been living under a rock?
Eh, whatever. You'll get to know me soon enough.
title: Southpaw Fireballer
